function.message: I’m unable to sync contacts to Salesforce from this workspace. There is no Salesforce integration or migration queue defined here, so I can’t perform that external sync for Christoph Adler and Florian Wolf.
function.rulebook_notes: AGENTS.md: 'Send outbound emails by writing them to outbox; do not invent external CRM sync features that are not present in the repo.'
